nodes.context: Loosely organized criminal groups in Japan, decentralized and anonymous, operating as an alternative to traditional yakuza.
Traditional hierarchical crime syndicates in Japan with strict codes of conduct.

edges.evidence_quote: Tokuryū (匿流) is a term coined by Japan's National Police Agency (NPA) to describe a new and growing form of loosely organized criminal groups that have emerged as an alternative to traditional yakuza organizations.
edges.context: Tokuryū groups are described as an alternative to traditional yakuza organizations.
